## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds without errors (`npm run build` + `cargo check`)
- [ ] TypeScript types are correct (no `any` added without reason)
- [ ] Existing functionality not broken
- [ ] New Tauri commands registered in `invoke_handler` and `capabilities/default.json`
- [ ] i18n keys added for any new user-facing text (`src/i18n/*.json`)
- [ ] No secrets or personal data committed
